caption: Table 8. Boot space versus RDP protection
rows: Boot address only in RSS or secure flash memory: 0x0C00 0000 - 0x0C07 FFFF Otherwise, forced boot address is 0x0FF8 0000.
Boot address only in RSS or secure flash memory: 0x0C00 0000 - 0x0C07 FFFF Otherwise, forced boot address is 0x0FF8 0000.
Boot address only in RSS or secure flash memory: 0x0C00 0000 - 0x0C07 FFFF Otherwise, forced boot address is 0x0FF8 0000.
Boot address only in flash memory 0x0800 0000 - 0x0807 FFFF Otherwise, forced boot address is 0x0800 0000.
